landing.hero.headline: Stop Managing Training in Spreadsheets.
landing.hero.subheadline: EDBAHN is the Training Management Application that automates logistics, enforces S.M.A.R.T. curriculum design, and centralizes compliance — so you can focus on outcomes, not overhead.
landing.hero.trialBadge: 14-day free trial — no credit card required
landing.painpoints.subtitle: Sound Familiar?
landing.painpoints.title: The L&D Problems Nobody Solves
landing.painpoints.logisticsDesc: Headcount, attendance, scores, and retake tracking buried in spreadsheets and disconnected tools.
landing.painpoints.transfersDesc: Trainees miss their assigned slot and the manual rescheduling process eats hours of admin time.
landing.painpoints.provisioningDesc: Granting tool access or sending credentials after training is a slow, manual email-by-email process.
landing.painpoints.curriculumDesc: Building a truly S.M.A.R.T. training curriculum that maps onto a practical agenda is tedious and error-prone.
landing.smart.subtitle: Our Approach
landing.smart.title: S.M.A.R.T. by Design, Not by Accident
landing.smart.quote: Most Learning Management Systems primarily function as video hosts or content repositories. EDBAHN engineers outcomes by hard-coding the S.M.A.R.T. methodology into the DNA of every session and curriculum.
landing.smart.description: This approach transforms vague training efforts into quantifiable, measurable professional growth.
landing.smart.specificDesc: Define precise learning objectives for every session
landing.smart.measurableDesc: Track outcomes with the Kirkpatrick evaluation model
landing.smart.achievableDesc: Map learning goals to practical, actionable agendas
landing.smart.relevantDesc: Align training directly to organizational goals
landing.smart.timeBoundDesc: Schedule with built-in timelines and deadlines
landing.features.subtitle: Platform Capabilities
landing.features.title: Everything You Need to Run Training
landing.features.description: From S.M.A.R.T. course design to AI-powered insights, EDBAHN covers every aspect of training management
landing.features.smartSchedulingDesc: Build curriculums with built-in S.M.A.R.T. methodology. Create courses, modules, and sessions that map to measurable objectives.
landing.features.attendanceDesc: Track attendance, training hours, issues, and parking lot questions. Generate compliance reports automatically.
landing.features.aiDesc: AI-powered training intelligence that helps you optimize sessions, identify gaps, and improve outcomes.
landing.features.timelineDesc: Visualize training timelines and evaluate effectiveness using the Kirkpatrick model across all four levels.
landing.features.communicationsDesc: Mass emails, survey integration, calendar sync, and multi-language support to keep everyone informed.
landing.features.analyticsDesc: Comprehensive dashboards with training analytics, group management, and timezone-aware reporting.
landing.pricing.subtitle: Pricing Plans
landing.pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
landing.pricing.description: Flexible pricing in CAD to meet your organization's training needs
landing.pricing.essentialDesc: Perfect for independent trainers and small teams getting started
landing.pricing.professionalDesc: Ideal for growing organizations with advanced training needs
landing.pricing.enterpriseDesc: Full-scale solution for large organizations and academies
landing.pricing.footer1: All plans include core training management: scheduling, attendance, training hours, mass communications, S.M.A.R.T. course scheduling, and curriculum management
landing.pricing.footer2: Start with a 14-day free trial • No credit card required • Cancel anytime
landing.contact.title: Get in Touch
landing.contact.description: Ready to streamline your training operations? Contact our team to learn how EDBAHN can automate your L&D workflows and improve outcomes.
landing.contact.responseTimeDesc: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.
landing.contact.subject: Subject
landing.contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your training needs, questions, or how we can help your organization...
landing.contact.privacyNote: By submitting this form, you agree to our privacy policy. We'll only use your information to respond to your inquiry.
landing.contact.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
landing.contact.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again.
landing.contact.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
landing.cta.trainersDesc: Manage client sessions, track attendance, and generate reports — all from one place.
landing.cta.corporateDesc: Centralize multi-department training, enforce compliance, and scale with sub-organizations.
